title: HCM Console — Health Campaign Management
summary: Health campaign management system for African field operations, enabling configuration of campaign workflows and real-time monitoring.
description: Led architecture and development of the HCM Console (Oct 2023), a comprehensive platform for managing large-scale health campaigns in resource-constrained field settings across Africa.
Built configurable workflow engine allowing health administrators to design multi-stage campaigns (registration, screening, treatment, follow-up) without code changes.
Implemented real-time monitoring dashboards showing campaign progress, resource allocation, and field team performance metrics.
Designed offline-first sync capabilities for field workers operating in areas with intermittent connectivity, with conflict resolution and data reconciliation on sync.
Integrated with DIGIT's service registry for interoperability with other government services and third-party systems.

title: MUKTA (Digit Works) — Employment Scheme Platform
summary: Employment scheme delivery platform for urban workers in Odisha, managing wage payments and work orders across municipal bodies.
description: Architected MUKTA/Digit Works (Jul 2022-Sep 2023), a comprehensive employment scheme management platform deployed across urban local bodies in Odisha for wage employment programs.
Built end-to-end workflow for work order creation, labor attendance tracking, muster roll generation, and wage calculation with government compliance rules.
Designed payment disbursement system integrating with state treasury and banking systems for direct benefit transfer to workers' bank accounts.
Implemented contractor and vendor management modules with rate analysis, material procurement tracking, and project progress monitoring.
Created mobile-first attendance capture interface for field supervisors, with biometric integration and geo-tagging capabilities.
Delivered admin dashboards for scheme monitoring, anomaly detection, and financial reconciliation used by urban local body officials.

title: DIGIT Workbench — Configuration Management
summary: Centralized configuration management platform using JSON Schema Draft 7 for dynamic UI generation across DIGIT modules.
description: Designed DIGIT Workbench (Jul-Oct 2023), a low-code configuration management system enabling product managers and administrators to configure DIGIT modules without developer intervention.
Built JSON Schema Draft 7-based validation engine that generates type-safe forms and validates configurations across 15+ DIGIT modules (PGR, TL, PT, WS, SW, etc.).
Implemented version control for configurations with diff visualization, rollback capabilities, and audit trails for compliance tracking.
Created template library allowing reuse of common configuration patterns across different urban local bodies and states.
Delivered approval workflow system for configuration changes, with environment promotion (dev → staging → production) and automated testing.

title: CARE Radiology & Tele-Radiology Integration
summary: End-to-end DICOM and PACS integration for CARE HMIS, connecting hospital imaging modalities to a federated OHIF Viewer.
description: Built the CARE DICOM Enabler, a Windows .NET service using fo-dicom that bridges DICOM modalities (CT, MRI, X-ray) to the CARE Django backend, validated against the DVTK emulator before real-device rollout.
Integrated DCM4CHEE as the PACS layer and the OHIF Viewer as a federated React module inside care_fe's plugin architecture.
Mapped patient-journey pain points for radiology access across rural, semi-urban, and urban public health settings, framed around FHIR DiagnosticReport, PACS, and tele-radiology workflows.
Ran gap analysis on a TeleRadiology integration SOW (OHIF Viewer, DCM4CHEE, Report Engine) to determine vendor payment readiness.

title: eAushadhi Pharmacy Integration
summary: Connected CARE's pharmacy workflows to Karnataka's government eAushadhi API, with a design built for multi-state expansion.
description: Rearchitected the pharmacy data model around a composite natural key with per-facility-date sync control records.
Implemented trigram-based fuzzy drug-name matching using Django's TrigramSimilarity to reconcile inconsistent naming across formularies.
Built a configurable parsing layer designed for multi-state rollout, with Jharkhand's DVDMS integration as the next target.
Routed integration traffic through a Cloudflare Worker proxy in front of the government API.

title: DIGIT Public Grievance Redressal (PGR)
summary: Citizen complaint and feedback module used across 450+ urban local bodies on the DIGIT platform.
description: Ported and maintained the PGR module from DIGIT OSS Urban into the DIGIT-Frontend monorepo.
Contributed to the broader DIGIT UI module ecosystem (core, common/payments, DSS dashboards).
Built a strategic presentation and analysis exploring citizen-voice integration patterns between CARE HMIS and DIGIT PGR.

title: Superset Analytics on k3s
summary: Self-managed Kubernetes infrastructure for dashboarding and analytics, deployed with GitOps practices.
description: Forked and deployed Apache Superset (care-ecosystem/superset) on a k3s cluster on AWS (ap-south-1).
Configured Cloudflare DNS, an Elastic IP, and Traefik ingress for the cluster domain.
Set up ArgoCD for GitOps-style deployment and designed a separate configs repository for dashboard import/export workflows.

title: Multi-Architecture Docker Migration
summary: Converted core care-ecosystem services to amd64 + arm64 builds publishing to GHCR.
description: Migrated GitHub Actions workflows across the CARE backend, care_fe, OHIF Viewer, slapd-dcm4chee, and Superset images to build and publish multi-platform images.
Standardized the build pipeline to support both cloud (amd64) and edge/ARM deployment targets for resource-constrained facility hardware.
